description: Dependency DAG for staged rollout of the Codex App Server runtime and adjacent SDK surfaces.

nodes.label: Runtime Evidence Freeze
nodes.description: Capture installed-runtime baseline evidence and check in operator-review artifacts.
exit_criteria: all baseline packs execute with no failures
artifacts are committed to the harness repo
tracker records the runtime baseline as the default authority surface

nodes.label: Operator-Led Staging
nodes.description: Use the runtime-authoritative App Server lane in guarded manual or operator-driven flows.
exit_criteria: manual staging workflows run against installed app-server
operator review loop is documented and stable

nodes.label: Typed Client Parity
nodes.description: Add typed Python and TypeScript client lanes for App Server and a mapped TypeScript Codex SDK lane.
exit_criteria: Python App Server client lane exists beyond the single probe implementation
TypeScript App Server client lane exists
TypeScript Codex SDK smoke flows are mapped against the rollout surface

nodes.label: Approval-Gated Shared Control
nodes.description: Promote approvals, request_user_input, and shared-control semantics into staged production workflows.
exit_criteria: real server-initiated approval flow is exercised end to end
approvals pack upgrades from partial to passed under a controlled run

nodes.label: Remote Surface Parity
nodes.description: Align desktop, web, and cloud-facing surfaces with the runtime-authoritative control plane.
exit_criteria: desktop, web, and cloud lanes are described as projections over the native control plane
surface-specific deltas are captured explicitly instead of inferred

nodes.label: Source Regression Lane
nodes.description: Compare installed-runtime behavior against repo-built source lanes and regression fixtures.
exit_criteria: workspace source lane is callable through the same harness model
runtime vs source drift is measurable
regression checks exist for release gating
